subcodes.first_line: O God, We render praise unto Thee for Thy bountiful gifts and mighty faithfulness to those whom Thou hast chosen through the light of guidance and elected for Thy Call [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نحمدک اللهم علی جزیل العطا و عظیم الوفا مع الذین اصطیفتهم بنور الهدی و اجتبیتهم للندآء
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @music and singing, @symbolism, @mystical themes
